topic: Deep Learning: CNNs for Image Recognition & RNNs for Sequence Data

questions.scenario: Real-world Industrial Problem Statement: A manufacturing company wants to develop a quality control system that uses computer vision to classify products as defective or non-defective based on images. The images are taken from a production line with varying lighting conditions and the products have complex designs, resulting in high-dimensional image data.
questions.question: What type of deep learning architecture is most suitable for this image classification task, considering the high-dimensional image data and need for real-time classification?
questions.explanation: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are most suitable for image classification tasks due to their ability to extract features from images using convolutional and pooling layers, handling high-dimensional image data, and robustness to varying lighting conditions.

questions.scenario: Real-world Industrial Problem Statement: A healthcare organization wants to develop a system that can predict patient outcomes based on their medical history, which includes time-stamped data such as medication prescriptions, lab results, and diagnoses. The organization wants to use this system to identify high-risk patients and provide proactive care.
questions.question: What type of deep learning architecture is most suitable for modeling the sequence data and predicting patient outcomes in this scenario?
questions.explanation: Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) Networks are a type of Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) that is particularly well-suited for modeling sequence data, such as time-stamped medical history, due to their ability to learn long-term dependencies and handle vanishing gradients.

questions.scenario: Real-world Industrial Problem Statement: A company wants to develop a chatbot that can understand and respond to customer queries in real-time. However, the customer queries are often skewed towards a few popular topics, and the company wants to ensure that the chatbot is not biased towards these topics.
questions.question: What technique can be used to handle the skewed data and ensure that the chatbot is not biased towards popular topics?
questions.explanation: Class weights can be used to handle skewed data by assigning different weights to different classes during training, which helps to reduce the bias towards the majority class and improves the performance on the minority class.
